evals.prompt: PHPUnit fails with SQLSTATE[23503] foreign key violation on orders test — started after my last commit.
evals.expected_output: Agent investigates diff and migrations, identifies FK ordering or factory issue, proposes minimal fix and validation command.

evals.prompt: CI pipeline backend:test fails: Connection refused to postgres:5432 in GitLab job only.
evals.expected_output: Agent compares local vs CI env, checks service config and env vars, evidence-based diagnosis with validation steps.

evals.prompt: Login form submits but UI shows blank screen — no console errors.
evals.expected_output: Agent traces API response shape vs frontend expectations, separates hypothesis from evidence, suggests minimal fix.
